hero.headline: The best solar for your
hero.subcopy: We don't sell a brand — we sell the right one. Complete packages from JA Solar, Longi, Fronius, Huawei and SMA. Shipped from Austria, delivered in 3–5 business days.

featured_packages.description: Curated by our engineers — modules, inverters and mounting systems matched together. No guesswork, no wrong purchase. All prices incl. 0 % VAT (zero tax rate Austria).
featured_packages.configurator_text: Nothing fits perfectly? Start the configurator.
featured_packages.configurator_sub: 4 steps to your own package — with installation or DIY

how_it_works.headline: From click to your
how_it_works.description: You don't need to be an electrician. We've made the process so simple that most customers have their system up and running within two weeks.
how_it_works.step_1_description: Start with a ready-made package or build your own system. Our engineers review it for free.
how_it_works.step_2_description: Upload photo & address — we calculate tilt, shading and yield within 24 hours.
how_it_works.step_3_description: Shipping within Austria in 3–5 business days. Germany delivery on request. Pallet delivered right to your door.
how_it_works.step_4_description: Connect it yourself with our video guide — or we arrange certified installers in your area.

calculator.headline: What does solar bring to
calculator.description: Three sliders. No email, no call. Just an honest picture of the numbers.
calculator.roof_hint: South / East / West facing — no shading
calculator.vat_note: 0 % VAT · Zero tax rate in Austria up to 20 kWp

why_us.usp_1_description: We're not tied to any manufacturer — we recommend what really fits your roof. 8 inverter brands in stock.
why_us.usp_2_description: Central warehouse in Wiener Neustadt. No customs, no 6-week container lottery. Pallets at your door in 3–5 business days.
why_us.usp_3_description: On modules and inverters. We handle the process — not you with a manufacturer in Shenzhen.
why_us.usp_4_description: Installation videos for self-assembly. Or we arrange certified electricians from your area at a fixed price.
why_us.headline: No manufacturer.
why_us.subtext: Other shops push a brand because they have margin deals. We sit on your side of the table — and we'll tell you when the cheaper module is the better one.
why_us.review_quote: After three quotes, they were the only ones who advised me against getting the bigger system. That built trust.

faq.subtext: Something not covered? Just call us — a technician, not a call centre.
faq.faq_1_question: Is a PV system still worth it at current electricity prices?
faq.faq_1_answer: Yes — more clearly than ever. Electricity prices in Austria remain at an average of 34 cents/kWh for households even after the 2023 peak. For a typical 10 kWp system with 60 % self-consumption, the system pays for itself in 6–8 years. The zero VAT rate (0 % up to 20 kWp) shortens that further.
faq.faq_2_question: I don't understand the technology. Can I still order?
faq.faq_2_answer: That's exactly what our complete packages are for. Modules, inverters, mounting system and cables are pre-matched — you don't need to calculate anything.
faq.faq_3_question: What happens if an inverter fails in 8 years?
faq.faq_3_answer: We handle the warranty for you. We offer 25-year product warranty on modules and 10–12 years on inverters (extendable to 20).
faq.faq_4_answer: Yes, delivery to Germany is possible — with an additional 3–5 business days transit time and German VAT rate.
faq.faq_5_question: What do I need from my grid operator?
faq.faq_5_answer: A registration of the generation system — either you do it yourself or we handle it for a flat fee of € 190.
faq.faq_6_question: Can I install the modules myself?
faq.faq_6_answer: The mechanical installation yes. The electrical connection must be carried out by a licensed electrician. We arrange electricians from € 490.

final_cta.headline:
What are
you
waiting for?
final_cta.subtext: Every week without a system is about € 32 in electricity you're giving to the grid operator. It doesn't have to be that way.

category_grid.subtext: For DIY enthusiasts and experienced planners: all components individually, with real-time stock availability.
